positive: A symmetrical and highly detailed celestial botanical arrangement featuring bioluminescent moonflowers and stylized constellations. The composition is centered and utilizes strong silhouette work, presenting a cosmic garden feel. Use a dark, velvety midnight blue background contrasted sharply with glowing neon gold and deep teal accents. The overall aesthetic should be reminiscent of neo-vintage etching mixed with vaporwave cosmic glow, designed for high-contrast screen printing on apparel. Clean linework, fractal symmetry, and ethereal light shafts emanating from the glowing flora.
negative: blurry, low detail, amateur, messy, text, signature, watermark, logo, trademark, cartoon, realistic, human, bad anatomy, distorted, noise, jpeg artifacts, poorly rendered limbs
